sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطِّفْلُ يَخَافُ مِنَ الظَّلَامِ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translationEn: The child was afraid of the dark at night.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَطْلُبُ مِنْ أُمِّهِ أَنْ تُشْعِلَ لَهُ الضَّوْءَ.
sentences.translation: Tražio je od majke da mu upali svjetlo.
sentences.translationEn: He would ask his mother to turn on the light for him.

sentences.translation: Majka je sjedila pored njega dok nije zaspao.
sentences.translationEn: The mother sat beside him until he fell asleep.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ بِالأَمَانِ حِينَ كَانَتْ أُمُّهُ قَرِيبَةً مِنْهُ.
sentences.translation: Osjećao se sigurno kada je majka bila blizu njega.
sentences.translationEn: He felt safe when his mother was close to him.
